title: Deploy a static WordPress site
excerpt: description: Learn how to deploy a static WordPress site using Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this guide, you will use a WordPress plugin, [Simply Static ↗](https://wordpress.org/plugins/simply-static/), to convert your existing WordPress site to a static website deployed with Cloudflare Pages. * The Administrator account on your WordPress site.
